programme.desc: A Missouri couple with a long history of visiting Kentucky Lake, Ky., is determined to find a permanent retreat where they can indulge in the area's natural beauty; they bring their teen daughter along to help scope out what the area has to offer.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A couple with two daughters currently lives in Lansing, N.Y.; they want to remain in the Cayuga Lake region, but they're looking for a more spacious home closer to the lake's lapping shores.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: An Alabama couple that grew up fishing and relaxing on the water want to pass that lifestyle down to their newborn by moving the family to Smith Lake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A family that frequents the Brainerd Lakes area of Minnesota has a dream of owning a cabin in this location; now that the kids are about to head off to college, they feel like it is time to take the leap and purchase their waterfront dream home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A couple with two young kids are in the process of growing their family through adoption; they both grew up near Mississippi's Barnett Reservoir and want to find a home with more space while fulfilling their lifelong dream of living on the water.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two siblings look for a waterfront vacation home on Long Lake, Wis., so they can give their kids the same great memories they had growing up.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds searches southeast Michigan for a lakeside retreat where they can plant roots and start a family.
